info.description: Landing page content for the Work with Anna section on the main menu.

kicker.description: Small uppercase label above the title.

intro_v2.description: Intro paragraph below the title. Select text and click the link icon to add a hyperlink — a popup will ask you for the URL.

hero_image.description: Optional hero image at the top of the section.

kicker_colour.description: Hex colour for the kicker label. Default is the brand colour for this section.

ways_section_title.description: WAYS TO WORK SECTION — Heading above the Signal Method paragraph.

ways_section_body.default: The Signal Method™ is the umbrella for all the coaching work here. Underneath it sit the programmes, each designed for a different stage of the journey. Whether you are just beginning to notice the patterns, or you are ready to rewire them completely, there is a way in.
ways_section_body.description: WAYS TO WORK SECTION — Body paragraph under the heading.

ways_section_cta_label.default: What do you need right now?
ways_section_cta_label.description: WAYS TO WORK SECTION — Primary button text.

ways_section_cta_url.description: WAYS TO WORK SECTION — Primary button link.

programmes_kicker.description: PROGRAMMES SECTION — Small uppercase label above the heading.

programmes_title.description: PROGRAMMES SECTION — Heading above the programme cards. Cards are pulled from the Coaching Session collection.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Fills in automatically when you Save — leave blank unless you want to override

upsells.description: Up to 3 'next step' cards shown at the bottom of this page. Each card has an image + label + short blurb + link. Leave empty to hide the upsell block entirely. Example use: on the About page, point to the Reset Room and Reset Letters.
